title: rule.source_of_truth
body: Source-of-truth entities must be prioritized in retrieval and final context.

title: rule.deprecated_filter
body: Deprecated entities must be excluded unless explicitly requested.

title: rule.adr_recency
body: Newer ADR supersedes older ADR when both address the same decision.

title: rule.conflict_flag
body: If two active sources conflict, return both and flag a conflict instead of guessing.

title: rule.context_budget
body: Limit runtime context to highest-signal evidence blocks (top_k).
